subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! What a joyous moment it is when I am occupied with thoughts of you and find comfort in your remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء چه خوش دمی است که بیاد شما مشغولم و بذکر شما مالوف گهی از
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love and unity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
